title: PromptFramework
description: A reusable prompt-architecture framework node, lazily recorded when first used via prompt.render (agency/capabilities/prompt/clusters/frameworks.py; Spec 304/305 + Spec 153 Slice 6 — discover-prompt wave). Indexed by slug; routes intent categories to the optimal framework via prompt.route_framework.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, e.g. 'chain-of-thought'. Primary lookup key.

intent_category.description: Which user intent category this framework primarily serves. 'functional' is the meta category for agency-internal frameworks (held out of user-facing routing).

complexity_tier.description: Prompt engineering complexity tier — maps to the SKILL.md Quick Reference grouping.

audience.description: Whether this framework serves a human authoring a prompt ('user') or agency's own functional surface ('functional').
